title: bug affecting simple function to pick an item at random
description:
### What happens?

My bug, my apologies.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(UInt32));
SELECT values[1] FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT values[2] FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayJoin(values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: selecting an out-of-bounds index from an array
